description: jpirft Mo Late Mw ARNOLD BENNETT SAYS NATIONS MUST NOW ADOPT NEW CLEARER WAR AIMS British Labor is Swinging Parliament and Prime Minister to President Wilsons Answento PopeA League of Nations to Maintain Peace the Supreme Object GERMAN PEOPLE MUST ACCEPT DESTRUCTION OE MILITARISM By Arnold Bennett London Jan 15 The deep feel ing of the mass of the nation is effectively rising to the surface It is seen in the changed attitude of the British Prime Minister in his latest statement of the war aims It has even induced Lord Robert Cecil least medieval mem ber of the great medieval govern ing family of England to repudiate an economic war against Germany after the war and to stand by the League of Nations as one of the main objects of the war True Mr Balfour spiritual head of the medievalists made no prog ress His last speech with its eva sions its omissions its shufflings and its debating society points was a miserable and hopeless exhibi tion of failure to comprehend that any change has taken place or ever will take place In human Ideals or society Mr Balfour has some excellent qualities he has however the dis astrous
